WILLY'S CATERING
Catering that fits every craving
From office lunches to holiday parties, turn any gathering into a feast with Willy’s Build Your Own Bars. Let your crew pile on their favorites for a fresh, flavorful spread everyone will enjoy.
ORDER CATERING
A WILLY'S FAVORITE
THE BAJA BURRITO
Willy’s fans love the Baja Burrito! Loaded and grilled with your choice of chicken or steak, Monterey Jack cheese, sauteed peppers & onions, then smothered in chipotle salsa and cheese dip. The meal comes with a side of our handmade pico de gallo and guacamole, plus rice, black beans and sour cream.
ORDER NOW
WILLY GOOD REWARDS
THE PERKS START WHEN YOU SIGN UP
Earn 10 points for each $1 spent on orders placed in store, online or in the app to unlock rewards. Start earning now and get a free reward just for signing up!
JOIN NOW
THE WILLY'S DIFFERENCE
It ALL STARTS IN OUR KITCHEN
No freezers, no microwaves and only the freshest quality ingredients is how we roll at Willy’s.
Our teams slice, dice, chop, grill and shred in our kitchens daily to provide only the freshest quality food.
Learn more
COMMUNITY LOVE
GIVING BACK TO OUR COMMUNITIES
Willy’s is a proud supporter of our local communities and understands the importance of giving back.
If your school or organization would like to find ways to partner with us, contact us.

Ingredients
Willy’s Favorites
You don’t just serve fresh grilled Mexican food for over three decades without stumbling upon a masterpiece or two. Enjoy a few of our specialties, each complete with a side of FREE chips and salsa.
Willy Philly Burrito
Steak, rice, cheese dip, cheddar cheese, peppers & onions, and serrano crema.
Baja Burrito
Chicken or steak, Monterey Jack cheese, sautéed peppers & onions. Grilled and smothered in enchilada sauce and cheese dip.
Willy's Frito Burrito
Adobe chicken served with Frito chips, rice, pinto beans, sour cream, chipotle puree and Willy’s cheese dip.
Goal Bowl
Lettuce, adobe chicken, pico de gallo, guacamole, and cucumbers.
Taco Salad
A fried crispy tortilla shell loaded with ground beef, black beans, lettuce, cheese dip, pico de gallo, sour cream, and guacamole.
Southwest Chicken Salad
Grilled chicken, black beans, pico de gallo, corn salsa, jack cheese, guacamole, and tortilla strips.
Build Your Own
Make your favorite Willy’s item the way you like it. Every order comes with a side of FREE chips and salsa.
Build Your Own Burrito
Vegetarian rice, your choice of beans, and endless combinations of fresh ingredients tightly wrapped in a soft tortilla.
Build Your Own Bowl
All the delicious rice, beans, proteins, and veggies you love in a burrito minus the tortilla or served on the side.
Build Your Own Salad
Crisp greens with your choice of protein, fresh ingredients, and house-made dressings – Chipotle Ranch, Lite Tomatillo Ranch and SW Vinaigrette.
Build Your Own Quesadilla
Soft flour tortilla stuffed with your favorite protein and grilled to crispy perfection and served with pico de gallo salsa and sour cream. Make it a Grande Quesadilla – larger tortilla with more ingredients and guacamole included.
Build Your Own Tacos
Two tacos served in your choice of soft flour, soft corn, or crispy corn tortillas. Topped with your favorite freshly made ingredients.
Nachos
Homemade tortilla chips topped with whatever you want. Served with beans, salsa, sour cream, and guacamole.
Family Meals
Take It Home. Build Your Own.
Our Build-Your-Own Taco Box is the perfect solutions for families on the go, small gatherings, work meetings, or when there is just no time to cook.
Taco Box
Feeds 4-6 people and includes the following:
Choice of two proteins, lettuce, Monterey Jack cheese, pico de gallo, sour cream, choice of one salsa and 16 hard/soft shells.
Side items: Rice, choice of black/pinto beans and chips
Add-ons: Cheese Dip, Guacamole or 6 Chocolate Chip Cookies
Salsa Bar
We love our variety and that our chips and salsa are free with every entrée purchase.
Chili D'Arbol
A truly unique sauc

--- Page: /about ---
Mexican Food | Willy's Mexicana Grill - About Us
All You Ever Wanted to Know(But Were Too Full to Ask)
It all started with a guy named Willy
One day, Willy left home and went west. Like young people often do, Willy believed journeying away from home would be just what he needed to find himself. However, what he actually found was a love for authentic Mexican food.
It was after feasting in San Francisco’s Mission district (or “The Land of the Burrito Gods” as Willy calls it), that Willy’s true calling hit him in the head like a ton of pinto beans. It was time to take the flavors he had discovered and share them with the world… or at least Atlanta. So, with a head full of tightly-rolled dreams, a little funding, and hardly a clue what the future would hold, Willy opened up his first family restaurant. His mom ran the line, Willy’s passion for fresh flavors ran the menu, and our family of valued employees has kept everything running smoothly ever since.
Today, our passion for incredible food just keeps on growing. With new locations popping up all the time, we’ve been able to spread the gospel of delicious, freshly-made burritos without sacrificing even a bit of quality.
We’re proud to call Atlanta home and staying connected to our community is enormously important to us. Here are a few local partnerships we’re particularly proud about:
Boys & Girls Club of Metro Atlanta
A few highlights of our partnership include raising over $130,000 and sponsoring their annual Salsa Salsa event to support eating right.
ATLFamilyMeal
In response to the COVID-19 pandemic, we’ve helped ATLFamilyMeal provide over 27,000 meals for unemployed restaurant workers and counting.
Burrito Project ATL
This international nonprofit organization is dedicated to helping feed the homeless. We’ve donated over 400 burritos to their Atlanta chapter.
Giving Kitchen
We raised over $7,000 through our $5 off Taco Box promotion to help the Giving Kitchen provide emergency aid to food service workers in crises.
Want to Partner with Us?
We love to work with as many schools and nonprofit organizations as we can.
Visit our Community Involvement page to learn more about our different fundraising and donation options!
Community Involvement
Green As Our Cilantro
Fresh ingredients require a healthy Earth. We make each of our locations as environmentally friendly as we can and are constantly looking for ways to incorporate green thinking into our business.
Our eco-friendly initiatives include:
Offering unbleached napkins made from recycled materials.
Self-programming thermostats to conserve power.
Tankless water heaters as code permits.
Recycling at locations where permitted.
Installing low-flow toilets and energy-efficient fixtures.
Low-energy, long-lasting light bulbs.
Using recycled box containers (vs. Styrofoam) for our quesadillas and nachos.
